label: Garmin → Obsidian
info:
Pulls wellness data from Garmin Connect and writes to Obsidian daily notes.

Setup:
1. Run: npm install  (in the strava-to-obsidian directory)
2. Edit the Setup inject node with your Garmin email/password, the full path to garmin-fetch.js, vault path, and timezone offset.
3. Click the Setup inject — it writes credentials to ~/.garmin-obsidian.json and stores config in Node-RED flow context.
4. Click the daily or weekly inject to test.

OAuth tokens are cached in garmin-tokens/ (alongside garmin-fetch.js) and reused automatically. Delete that directory to force re-login. Both credentials and tokens live in the mounted volume so they survive container restarts.
